summary: A Wikipedia biographical article detailing Aviv Regev's education, career trajectory, and major scientific contributions, including her pioneering work in single-cell genomics, systems biology, and the founding of the Human Cell Atlas.

mental_models.name: Cells as computation
mental_models.description: Using process algebra, specifically π-calculus, as a mathematical lens to represent, abstract, and simulate complex biochemical processes and cellular behavior.
mental_models.example: Applying π-calculus to represent biochemical processes in her early computational biology research.
